scripts.db:logs: bun run query --dev --q "SELECT * FROM (SELECT query, args, DATE(date / 1000, 'unixepoch') as date, error FROM query_logs WHERE DATE(date / 1000, 'unixepoch') > '2025-10-14' ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 100) ORDER BY date"
scripts.build-preview: bun run bun-build && bun run preview
scripts.deploy:test: bun run build && bunx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name byzantini-website --branch local-test
scripts.logs:test: bunx wrangler pages deployment tail $(bunx wrangler pages deployment list --project-name byzantini-website --environment preview --json | bun -e 'const text = await new Response(Bun.stdin.stream()).text(); const deployments = JSON.parse(text); const deployment = deployments.find((d) => d.Branch === "local-test"); if (!deployment) { console.error("No preview deployment found for branch local-test"); process.exit(1); } process.stdout.write(deployment.Id);') --project-name byzantini-website
scripts.docker:pdf: sudo docker build -f ./services/pdfWorker/local.Dockerfile -t pdfworker ./services/pdfWorker/ && sudo docker run --network host -d pdfworker
scripts.docker:img: sudo docker build -f ./services/imageCompression/local.Dockerfile -t imgcomp ./services/imageCompression/ && sudo docker run --network host -d imgcomp
scripts.docker:build: sudo docker build -f ./services/pdfWorker/local.Dockerfile -t pdfworker ./services/pdfWorker/ && sudo docker build -f ./services/imageCompression/local.Dockerfile -t imgcomp ./services/imageCompression/
scripts.docker:run: sudo docker run --network host -d pdfworker && sudo docker run --network host -d imgcomp
scripts.docker:logs: sudo docker logs -f $(sudo docker ps -q --filter ancestor=pdfworker) && sudo docker logs -f $(sudo docker ps -q --filter ancestor=imgcomp)
